title: OpenAI is discontinuing ChatGPT Atlas, its standalone desktop browser
summary: ChatGPT Atlas, OpenAI’s standalone desktop browser, is being sunset in favor of the new ChatGPT desktop app.
imageAlt: OpenAI is discontinuing ChatGPT Atlas, its standalone desktop browser
aiSummary: ChatGPT Atlas, OpenAI’s standalone desktop browser, is being sunset in favor of the new ChatGPT desktop app.
keyPoints: OpenAI is discontinuing ChatGPT Atlas, its standalone desktop browser
whyMatters: Noticia de actualidad en el sector de tecnologia.

multimedia.alt: OpenAI is discontinuing ChatGPT Atlas, its standalone desktop browser
multimedia.caption: Imagen de portada del artículo

fullArticle:
ChatGPT Atlas, OpenAI’s standalone desktop browser, is being sunset in favor of the new ChatGPT desktop app.

OpenAI released an all-new ChatGPT desktop app today, which includes a new ChatGPT Work agent alongside ChatGPT Codex.

With the new ChatGPT desktop app, OpenAI now has a desktop app with robust browser capabilities. ChatGPT (and Codex before it) also supports a Chrome desktop browser plugin. This lets Chrome users benefit from ChatGPT integration without completely switching browsers.

As part of today’s release, OpenAI’s James Sun confirms that ChatGPT Atlas, the standalone desktop browser, is being discontinued.

Lastly, with all these updates, we are going to be sunsetting Atlas.All these capabilities were built on what we learned from Atlas users who took a leap of faith on a ...
